---
name: Plan Sprint
description: "Tao task chain TDD va sprint plan tu cac REQ da duoc phe duyet."
argument-hint: "REQ-00001 (optional filter)"
agent: agent-pm
tools: [read, search, edit, execute, todo]
---
Thuc hien `/plan-sprint` theo PM workflow.

Yeu cau:
1. Xac minh branch va branch guard.
2. Tao chuoi TASK: unit-test -> implementation -> e2e-test.
3. Tao sprint plan va liet ke dependencies.
4. Bao cao danh sach artifact da tao/cap nhat.
